Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I have a new teacher, and he's, um...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}We're already a little into the first term, but it still feels weird to be in the room with him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}It's like, he doesn't talk at all, even during lunchtime.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I'm a sixth grader! I'll be moving on next year, and I'm stuck with a teacher like this... *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}How should I know? We never talk. When I say hello, he just smiles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I'm a sixth grader! I'll be moving on next year, and I'm stuck with a teacher like this... *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher doesn't assign us homework.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}But we're moving on to middle school next year... I'm worried...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Really? Did you not get much homework when you were in middle school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Maybe they're trying to relax the students...? Well, I hope I can at least graduate from college...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Yeah, there's a difference between taking it easy and slacking off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}If he wants to be popular with the students, he should just talk to them more often.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}So I should just wait until the teacher changes his attitude? That could take forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My classes are so boring... My teacher is okay, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My cousin always has way better stories of her classroom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My classes are so boring... My teacher is okay, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I'm so jealous of the classroom next door. I always hear laughter coming from it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher told me there's been a lot of kidnappings these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}But he already said that yesterday... And the day before that, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher uses special stationery, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}It's so childish. We're sixth graders and he treats us like little kids.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Oh, just with pictures of Mr. Fox and Mr. Raccoon, and stupid jokes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}He never talks, but he doodles all day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Like, Mr. Bear and Mr. Frog are on it, and they're rapping...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}It's weird. He's so quiet, I didn't imagine he was thinking of that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}The first term is finally over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}It never felt this long when I was in fifth grade, but this one seemed to go on forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Because my teacher is so boring![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Everyone in my class wishes we had a different teacher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}It's not just me! The other kids in my class think so too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}The class next door gets to go out and play with their teacher, but ours just stares out the window...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Our teacher didn't give us much homework over the summer break.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}The other classes were jealous, but... I'll be in middle school next year. I feel underprepared...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I saw my teacher at the mall. He seemed really tired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I tried to talk to him, but he just smiled. He's so boring! He's exactly the same out of class as in it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I better do my summer assignments. It's a good thing I don't have that much homework.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher never gives out much. Though I still don't really like him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Well, as far as summer vacation work goes, maybe so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}But the classes are boring, so in the end, it's not a good thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}What was that for!? You're so mean![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I have to sit through his boring lessons five times a week! I should get a medal![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Yeah... He's just another teacher, huh? It doesn't matter if I like him or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}The second term has started... I have that boring teacher again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I don't mind studying, but I can't stand the way he teaches...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I thought my teacher might be better this term, but I guess not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}He mumbles a lot, and doesn't have any energy, so class is really boring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher is getting all excited since Health and Sports Day is coming up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I wish he could get that excited about teaching class... We're almost middle school students.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher got upset for the first time the other day 'cause I ditched Health and Sports Day practice to study.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I don't get it... I had to study because his teaching is so bad![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My class won at Health and Sports Day. We set a new record for jumping rope![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}You think it's because our teacher put all his time into practice every day...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Our teacher came to life for Health and Sports Day, but now he's back to normal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}He's usually so calm, but when it comes to festivals, he's like a different person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I accidentally fell asleep in class, but the teacher didn't get mad at all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}So why'd he get so upset when I ditched Health and Sports Day practice? I don't get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}My teacher is so boring. I don't really dislike him, he's just annoying...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}We're sixth graders... We're almost out of elementary school! I wish I had another teacher...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}The other day, my teacher called on me in class. I just ignored him 'cause I don't like him much...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I thought he would get mad at me, like he did at that practice, but he just made a sad face...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I-It's not my fault! It's his fault for being so boring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I was ignoring my teacher 'cause he never talks to me, so I figured I'd be silent right back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Then he called on me and I told him so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}It was weird. He said, "I'm in the way of you guys hanging out together, right?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}He said the reason he doesn't give much homework and why he got mad at me for ditching practice...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}Is because he'd rather we have "good memories of elementary school," rather than homework.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I... I had no idea... I never thought of it that way...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}No... He actually apologized to me. "Sorry I'm not good at talking," he said.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 417}I didn't know he felt that way... And I...[n]{f 1 1}
